questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: If $x f(x)=3(f(x))^2+2$, then $\int \frac{2 x^2-12 x f(x)+f(x)}{(6 f(x)-x)\left(x^2-f(x)\right)^2} d x$ equals to
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & f^{\prime}(x)=\frac{f(x)}{6 f(x)-x} \\ & \therefore I=-\int \frac{2 x-f^{\prime}(x)}{\left(x^2-f(x)\right)^2} d x=\frac{1}{x^2-f(x)}+C\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: If $\int f(x) d x=\psi(x)$, then $\int x^5 f\left(x^3\right) d x$ is equal to:
questions.solution:
By Newton \& libnitz rule
$f(x)=\psi^{\prime}(x)$

$\begin{aligned} & \text { Put } x^3=t \Rightarrow \frac{d t}{d x}=3 x^2 \\ & =\frac{1}{3} \int t f(t) d t=\frac{1}{3} \int t \cdot \psi^{\prime}(t) d t=\frac{1}{3}\left[t \psi(t)-\int \psi(t) d t\right] \\ & =\frac{1}{3} x^3 \psi\left(x^3\right)-\int x^2 \psi\left(x^3\right) d x\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
The value of $\int \sqrt{\frac{(1-\sin x)(2-\sin x)}{(1+\sin x)(2+\sin x)}} d x$ is
(where $\left.t=\sqrt{\frac{2-\sin x}{2+\sin x}}\right)$
questions.solution:
Let $1+\sin x=y$
$\begin{aligned} & I=\int \frac{1}{y} \sqrt{\frac{3-y}{1+y}} d y \text { again let } \frac{3-y}{1+y}=t^2 \\ & I=8 \int \frac{t^2}{\left(t^2-3\right)\left(t^2+1\right)} d t=\sqrt{3} \ln \frac{t-\sqrt{3}}{t+\sqrt{3}}+2 \tan ^{-1} t+c\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: The value of $\int f^{\prime \prime}(x) F(x) d x-\int f(x) F^{\prime \prime}(x) d x$ is equal to
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & I=\int\left(f^{\prime \prime}(x) F(x)-f(x) F^{\prime \prime}(x)\right) d x=\int\left\{\left(f^{\prime \prime}(x) F(x)+f^{\prime}(x) F^{\prime}(x)\right)-\left(f(x) F^{\prime \prime}(x)+f^{\prime}(x) F^{\prime}(x)\right)\right\} d x \\ & =\int d\left(f^{\prime}(x) F(x)-f(x) F^{\prime}(x)\right)=f^{\prime}(x) F(x)-f(x) F^{\prime}(x)+c\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: If $I=\int \frac{x^5 d x}{\sqrt{1+x^3}}$, then $I$ is equal to
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & I=\int \frac{x^5 d x}{\sqrt{1+x^3}} \\ & 1+x^3=t^2 \\ & 3 x^2 d x=2 t d t \\ & I=\frac{2}{3} \int \frac{\left(t^2-1\right) t d t}{t}=\frac{2}{3} \int\left(t^2-1\right) d t=\frac{2}{3}\left[t^3 \times \frac{1}{3}-t\right]+C \\ & =\frac{2}{9}\left[t^3-3 t\right]+C=\frac{2}{9} t^3-\frac{2}{3} t+C=\frac{2}{9}\left(1+x^3\right)^{3 / 2}-\frac{2}{3}\left(1+x^3\right)^{1 / 2}+\mathrm{C}\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & I=\int \frac{\frac{1}{x^4}-\frac{1}{x^7}}{\sqrt{\frac{2}{x^6}-\frac{4}{x^3}+6}} d x \\ & \text { Let } \frac{2}{x^6}-\frac{4}{x^3}+6=t^2 \\ & \Rightarrow I=\frac{1}{6} \int d t=\frac{1}{6} \sqrt{\frac{2}{x^6}-\frac{4}{x^3}+6}+c=\frac{\sqrt{6 x^6-4 x^3+2}}{6 x^3}+c\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: If $f(x)=\sqrt{x}, g(x)=e^x-1$, and $\int f \circ g(x) d x=A f \circ g(x)+B \tan ^{-1}(f \circ g(x))+C$, then $A+B$ is equal to
questions.solution:
$f o g(x)=\sqrt{e^x-1}$
$\begin{aligned} & \therefore I=\int \sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{x}}-1} \mathrm{dx}=\int \frac{2 \mathrm{t}^2}{\mathrm{t}^2+1} \mathrm{dt}\left(\text { where } \sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{x}}-1}=\mathrm{t}\right) \\ & =2 \mathrm{t}-2 \tan ^{-1} \mathrm{t}+\mathrm{C}=2 \sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{x}}-1}-2 \tan ^{-1}\left(\sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{x}}-1}\right)+C=2 f o g(\mathrm{x})-2 \tan ^{-1}(\operatorname{fog}(\mathrm{x}))+C \\ & \therefore \mathrm{A}+\mathrm{B}=2+(-2)=0\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Let $S(x)=\int \frac{d x}{e^x+8 e^{-x}+4 e^{-3 x}}, R(x)=\int \frac{d x}{e^{3 x}+8 e^x+4 e^{-x}}$ and $M(x)=S(x)-2 R(x)$. If $M(x)=\frac{1}{2} \tan ^{-1}(f(x))+c$ where $c$ is an arbitrary constant then $f\left(\log _e 2\right)$ is equal to
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & M(x)=\int \frac{e^x\left(e^{2 x}-2\right)}{e^{4 x}+8 e^{2 x}+4} d x \\ & \text { Put } e^x=t\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: $\int e^{x^4}\left(x+x^3+2 x^5\right) e^{x^2} d x$ is equal to
questions.solution: Put $x^2=t$ $I=\frac{1}{2} \int e^t\left[t e^{t^2}+\left(e^{t^2}+2 t^2 e^{t^2}\right)\right] d t$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
